stemHtml: Within the PBN concept, how can "accuracy" be defined?

options.a: Being in compliance with the reference ellipsoid WGS-95.
options.b: Having total system error that is expected to be achieved at least 50% of the time.
options.c: A comparison between the required position and the true position.
options.d: Being within 1 NM laterally and within 500 ft vertically of the required position.
